title: selaginella subtrisulcata
intro: Selaginella subtrisulcata, also known as the 'Black Prayer Plant', is a species of evergreen flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella subtrisulcata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be dried or made into a tea to utilize its medicinal properties.
